generated_oml:
namespace rdfs = "http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.org/dtdf/vocab#"

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    rdfs:comment "Temperature sensor deployed in Living Lab building for operational data capture",
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    rdfs:comment "Light sensor deployed in Living Lab building for visual comfort metrics",
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    rdfs:comment "Occupancy sensor deployed in Living Lab building for space utilization data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    rdfs:comment "Real-time temperature data transmitted via MQTT/AMQP protocols",
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance LightData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    rdfs:comment "Real-time light intensity data transmitted via MQTT/AMQP protocols",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    rdfs:comment "Real-time occupancy data transmitted via MQTT/AMQP protocols",
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    rdfs:comment "BIM-based model with semantic asset data for Living Lab building",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEFrameworkEnabler
]

instance SemanticAssetData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    rdfs:comment "Semantic asset data embedded in BIM model for DT runtime artifacts",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance DeviceConfigurationsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    rdfs:comment "Device configuration metadata for Building Control Systems",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance MiddlewareMetadataData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    rdfs:comment "Middleware metadata for Eclipse Hono and Ditto integration",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoEnabler, DittoEnabler
]

instance RevitEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    rdfs:comment "Autodesk Revit tool for BIM model creation and management"
]

instance HonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    rdfs:comment "Eclipse Hono for MQTT/AMQP protocol handling and device connectivity",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance DittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    rdfs:comment "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management and device registry",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    rdfs:comment "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization of Digital Twin",
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance MDEFrameworkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    rdfs:comment "Model-Driven Engineering framework for automated BIM-to-DT transformation",
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance SimulatedEnergyUsage : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    rdfs:comment "Simulated energy usage data from building simulations"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    rdfs:comment "Real-time monitoring service for building operational data",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyUsagePatterns, VisualComfortMetrics
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    rdfs:comment "Building simulation service for energy and comfort optimization",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulatedEnergyUsage
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    rdfs:comment "Predictive analytics service for energy usage and comfort optimization",
    DTDFVocab:provides HealthImpactAssessments, LightingAdjustments, HVACScheduling
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    rdfs:comment "Interactive 3D visualization service using Unreal Engine 5",
    DTDFVocab:provides ThreeDVisualRepresentation
]

instance EnergyUsagePatterns : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    rdfs:comment "Energy consumption patterns derived from sensor data and simulations"
]

instance VisualComfortMetrics : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    rdfs:comment "Visual comfort metrics based on light intensity and occupancy data"
]

instance HealthImpactAssessments : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    rdfs:comment "Health impact assessments derived from environmental monitoring data"
]

instance ThreeDVisualRepresentation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    rdfs:comment "3D visual representation of the Digital Twin"
]

instance LightingAdjustments : DTDFVocab:Action [
    rdfs:comment "Automated lighting control adjustments based on visual comfort metrics",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HVACScheduling : DTDFVocab:Action [
    rdfs:comment "Automated HVAC scheduling based on occupancy and energy predictions",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    rdfs:comment "Actuator for lighting control within Building Control Systems executing DT commands"
]

instance HVACSActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    rdfs:comment "Actuator for HVAC system control within Building Control Systems executing DT commands"
]

instance BCSController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    rdfs:comment "Controller within Building Control Systems managing actuator operations from DT"
]

instance LivingLabBuilding : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    rdfs:comment "Living Lab building as the physical counterpart",
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, LightSensor, OccupancySensor, LightingActuator, HVACSActuator, BCSController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., lighting adjustments, HVAC settings) sent from the DT to physical actuators via Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time system modifications."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with sensor data and control command execution, enabling immediate updates between physical and virtual systems."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized DT Framework orchestrating BIM models, Eclipse Hono and Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, and modular services to enable bidirectional communication and holistic building management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all life cycle stages: design, construction, operation, and refurbishment phases, with the DT serving as a dynamic representation throughout the building's life."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity validated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to assess semantic coherence and synchronization accuracy between physical and virtual components."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT-based communication protocols through Eclipse Hono and Ditto for secure, scalable data exchange between physical devices and the DT."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM as the primary standard for semantic modeling in AECO projects, with standardized extension points for modular service integration in the DT framework."
]
